item.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
item.description: Focus: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

item.title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
item.description: Focus: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, while c

item.title: Data for Agents
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Data for Agents', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
item.description: Focus: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

item.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
item.description: Focus: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

item.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
item.description: Focus: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

item.title: Introducing GPT-Live
item.description: Focus: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

item.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
item.description: Focus: 2 years after our first coverage, we return with Modal's other cofounder to explore why Agent Experience is working now, and everything they have learned building the new agent cloud.

item.title: What a harness is and how to build one with Claude Agent SDK
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'What a harness is and how to build one with Claude Agent SDK', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: [AINews] Lilian Weng summarizes 35 papers on Harness Engineering for RSI
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us read some condensed insight

item.title: Vercel Agent: An agent you can let near production
item.description: Focus: Today we're expanding Vercel Agent . It started by triaging alerts and reviewing your pull requests. Now it has a home in your dashboard, where it can investigate production, answer questions about your projects, and take action once you approve it. Because Vercel Agent is built into the plat

item.title: Grok 4.5 now available on AI Gateway
item.description: Focus: Grok 4.5 from SpaceXAI is now available on AI Gateway . Built for coding, knowledge work, and STEM, the model accepts text and image inputs. Grok 4.5 supports low, medium, and high reasoning levels and defaults to high. Set the level with reasoning to balance speed against depth. To use Grok

item.title: Open, convenient and predictable: Introducing Provisioned Throughput
item.description: Focus: Provisioned Throughput gives you reserved inference capacity for frontier open models like MiniMax M3 and GLM-5.2. Token-based pricing, a 99% uptime SLA, and up to 90% lower cost than proprietary APIs. No GPU-hour math, no infrastructure to manage.

item.title: Update Project Settings from the Vercel CLI
item.description: Focus: You can now update a project's framework preset and build settings directly from the CLI, without opening the dashboard. Run vercel project update from a linked project, or pass a project name directly: Settings can also be returned to automatic detection instead of an explicit override: For

item.title: Vercel Microfrontends checks for missing configuration
item.description: Focus: The Microfrontends Config Present deployment check prevents broken production routing by blocking any default app deployment that is missing its microfrontends.json . This appears alongside other Native Deployment Checks , such as lint and typecheck. The check is blocking by default for eligi

item.title: Flags SDK now evaluates flags 10x faster
item.description: Focus: Flags SDK and Vercel Flags now evaluate multiple feature flags in bulk around 10x faster. Flag evaluation time improved by reducing microtask queue overhead and creating fewer promises. The improvement scales with the number of flags. Use await evaluate([flagA, flagB]) instead of Promise.all(

item.title: Use any Chat SDK adapter with eve
item.description: Focus: eve now supports Chat SDK adapters with the new Chat SDK channel . One channel connects your eve agent to Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, Resend, Liveblocks, and any other surface with an adapter . You write normal Chat SDK handler code, and calling send inside a handler hands the message to yo
